channel.title: docker on Li Chao Cheng Blog
channel.description: Recent content in docker on Li Chao Cheng Blog

item.title: docker 实战
item.description: docker 实战 docker 基本命令 docker 操作基础命令 docker images docker image ls docker ps docker ps -a docker stop [CONTAINER ID] docker rm [CONTAINER ID] docker restart [CONTAINER ID] docker start [CONTAINER ID] docker rm [CONTAINER ID] docker rmi [IMAGE ID] docker logs [CONTAINER ID] docker login –username=[hypeyhyper] [registry.cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com] docker tag [ImageId] registry.c

item.title: docker 安装实例
item.description: 安装redis 拉去镜像 docker pull redis:latest 启动 docker run -d –name redis -p 6379:6379 redis –requirepass “redispassword” 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 docker容器设置开机自启动： --restart具体参数值详细信息 no -
